name: GST Elution Buffer

notes.en: Prepare fresh — glutathione oxidizes rapidly. Add just before use. Adjust pH to 8.0. Elute at RT for 10–15 min.
notes.zh: 新鲜配制。谷胱甘肽易氧化，临用加入。调 pH 至 8.0。室温洗脱 10–15 min。

ref: Harper & Bhatt (2004) Methods Mol Biol 261:55–72; GE Healthcare GST Gene Fusion System Handbook
